name: conformance: the output conforms to the full-stack breadth (frontend, api, data, identity, storage, edge, and more)
command:
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/business-translate.sh" --profile "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/golden/fullstack-international-aws-profile.json" --out req.json --now 2026-06-08T00:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("req.json","utf8"));const ALL=Object.values(j.pillars).flat();const groups=Object.keys(j.pillars).filter(p=>(j.pillars[p]||[]).length>0);const srcs=new Set(ALL.map(c=>c.source_id));process.exit(["frontend","api","data","identity","storage","edge","integration","realtime","performance-efficiency","reliability","security","operational-excellence","testing","dependencies"].every(p=>(j.pillars[p]||[]).length>0)?0:1)' && echo full-stack-breadth 1>&2
